name: Brigitte's German Cabbage Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the whole head of cabbage in boiling water until the leaves come off.
2. Cut off the hard stem parts and cook the cabbage leaves individually in boiling salted water until partially cooked.
3. Mix ground beef, bread, salt, pepper, egg, and chopped onion together.
4. Make a white gravy by melting margarine in a saucepan, adding flour, water, and milk. Season with salt and pepper. Add capers or use tomato sauce for variation.
5. Grease the bottom and sides of a large casserole dish.
6. Layer cabbage leaves, meat mixture, and gravy alternately.
7. Top with additional cabbage leaves.
8. Cover and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 45-60 minutes.
